git commit -m t0026_vrest_sweep_tuning_curves_dsgc [reporting]: reshape metrics.json into explicit multi-variant format

Convert the legacy map-form variants block into the spec-conforming
array of 16 explicit variants (2 models x 8 V_rest values) with
variant_id, label, dimensions, and metrics fields using only registered
metric keys. verify_task_metrics now passes cleanly.
